searches.query: trending cloud computing topics AWS Azure
searches.answer: Hybrid and multi-cloud strategies, containerization, and AI/ML integration are trending in AWS and Azure. FinOps and green cloud computing are also key trends.

results.title: Trends in Cloud Adoption and Modernization with AWS and Azure
results.content: # Trends in Cloud Adoption and Modernization with AWS and Azure. In this blog post, we will explore three key trends shaping how businesses migrate and modernize their workloads in Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Microsoft Azure, two of the leading cloud platforms. One of the most significant trends in cloud adoption is the increasing popularity of hybrid and multi-cloud strategies. results.title: Kubernetes to deprecate Docker container runtime in v1.22 - SD Times
results.content: The Kubernetes team has announced that it is deprecating the use of the Docker container runtime sometime after the release of Kubernetes 1.20, which is the upcoming release of the container orchestration tool. Docker is still a useful tool for building containers, and the images that result from running docker build can still run in your Kubernetes cluster,” the Kubernetes team wrote in a post. The Kubernetes team explained that this change does not affect Docker images, and that Docker images
